description: Inputs that inject NaN, Infinity, or special float tokens that JSON.parse accepts as valid but are semantically dangerous in numeric contexts. The spec declares non-negative integer elements, so NaN/Infinity/-1 are all shape violations.

inputs.label: nan-keyword
inputs.rationale: NaN is not a valid JSON value and not an integer literal; SyntaxError on 'N'

inputs.label: infinity-keyword
inputs.rationale: Infinity is not a valid JSON value and not an integer literal; SyntaxError on 'I'

inputs.label: negative-infinity
inputs.rationale: Negative Infinity — negative sign triggers SyntaxError (spec: non-negative integers)

inputs.label: negative-integer
inputs.rationale: Negative integer — spec declares non-negative; '-' is not a digit

inputs.label: float-with-decimal
inputs.rationale: Float element — '.' after digit triggers end-of-integer, then SyntaxError on '.'

inputs.label: scientific-notation
inputs.rationale: 'e' after digits ends integer parse, then SyntaxError on 'e5' before closing bracket

inputs.label: null-element
inputs.rationale: null is not an integer literal; SyntaxError on 'n'

inputs.label: undefined-element
inputs.rationale: undefined is not valid JSON or an integer; SyntaxError on 'u'

inputs.label: positive-infinity-long
inputs.rationale: '+' is not a digit; SyntaxError at position 1

inputs.label: nan-in-list
inputs.rationale: NaN as second element; SyntaxError on 'N' at the second element position

inputs.label: float-in-list
inputs.rationale: Float as second element; '.' after '2' triggers SyntaxError

inputs.label: valid-zero-benign
inputs.rationale: Zero is a valid non-negative integer — control input
